TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Bunun, story: bnNr-pear_Ciang
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: aiza isian sia ludun maza munhuhuma maza bunun.
S.PHON: aiða iɕian ɕia l~ɬudun maða munx~χux~χuma maða bunun.
S.FORM: aiza isian sia ludun maza munhuhuma maza bunun.
S.PHON: aiða iɕian ɕia l~ɬudun maða munx~χux~χuma maða bunun.
S.TRANSL: 有一個山上的農人.
On the mountain, there is a farmer.

S.FORM: ungat adii a mabananaza tainihuma hai.
S.PHON: uŋat adii a mabananaða tainix~χuma x~χai.
S.FORM: ungat adii a mabananaza tainihuma hai.
S.PHON: uŋat adii a mabananaða tainix~χuma x~χai.
S.TRANSL: 然後,有一個男生在那個人的田.
And then there is a boy on his fields.

S.FORM: kudadaza saia sia sinsuaz saicia izuk.
S.PHON: kudadaða saia ɕia ɕinsuað saiʨia iðuk.
S.FORM: kudadaza saia sia sinsuaz saicia izuk.
S.PHON: kudadaða saia ɕia ɕinsuað saiʨia iðuk.
S.TRANSL: 他爬上他所種的柚子樹.
He went up to the pomelos cultivated by him.

S.FORM: a sisiza mas ungtu laascia.
S.PHON: a ɕiɕiða mas uŋtu l~ɬaasʨia.
S.FORM: a sisiza mas ungtu laascia.
S.PHON: a ɕiɕiða mas uŋtu l~ɬaasʨia.
S.TRANSL: 一直採果子.
He kept on plucking the fruit.

S.FORM: ansainun saicia sia andadaan tu mahaiav mahaiav tu iahlup.
S.PHON: ansainun saiʨia ɕia andadaan tu max~χaiav max~χaiav tu iax~χl~ɬup.
S.FORM: ansainun saicia sia andadaan tu mahaiav mahaiav tu iahlup.
S.PHON: ansainun saiʨia ɕia andadaan tu max~χaiav max~χaiav tu iax~χl~ɬup.
S.TRANSL: 被他放在專門裝的布袋.
He put them in the bag meant for packaging.

S.FORM: a mapunastu sia kalalacia.
S.PHON: a mapunastu ɕia kal~ɬal~ɬaʨia.
S.FORM: a mapunastu sia kalalacia.
S.PHON: a mapunastu ɕia kal~ɬal~ɬaʨia.
S.TRANSL: 他放下在籃子裡.
He put them down in the basket.

S.FORM: at aiza maza minuhalhal maza sia tu izuka hai izaun saicia.
S.PHON: at aiða maða minux~χal~ɬx~χal~ɬ maða ɕia tu iðuka x~χai iðaun saiʨia.
S.FORM: at aiza maza minuhalhal maza sia tu izuka hai izaun saicia.
S.PHON: at aiða maða minux~χal~ɬx~χal~ɬ maða ɕia tu iðuka x~χai iðaun saiʨia.
S.TRANSL: 有那個掉下來、被他採收的柚子.
Then there are the pomelos plucked by him, dropped on the ground.

S.FORM: mahaishais a maza pushu.
S.PHON: max~χaisx~χais a maða pusx~χu.
S.FORM: mahaishais a maza pushu.
S.PHON: max~χaisx~χais a maða pusx~χu.
S.TRANSL: 他擦一下灰塵.
He wiped off the dust.

S.FORM: mapudinuun mas siinza saicia tu a izukcia mapisia kalala.
S.PHON: mapudinuun mas ɕiinða saiʨia tu a iðukʨia mapiɕia kal~ɬal~ɬa.
S.FORM: mapudinuun mas siinza saicia tu a izukcia mapisia kalala.
S.PHON: mapudinuun mas ɕiinða saiʨia tu a iðukʨia mapiɕia kal~ɬal~ɬa.
S.TRANSL: 他把所採的柚子放在籃子.
He put the pomelos he collected in the basket.

S.FORM: minsuma tacini sasaipuk sidia a bunun maiskus mas a sidi anghaib.
S.PHON: minsuma taʨini sasaipuk ɕidia a bunun maiskus mas a ɕidi aŋx~χaib.
S.FORM: minsuma tacini sasaipuk sidia a bunun maiskus mas a sidi anghaib.
S.PHON: minsuma taʨini sasaipuk ɕidia a bunun maiskus mas a ɕidi aŋx~χaib.
S.TRANSL: 來了一個養羊的人,牽著羊經過.
A person who is rearing a goat passes by with it.

S.FORM: a maza sidia hai asa musuhis maun mas a izuk tu siniza sia kalalaa.
S.PHON: a maða ɕidia x~χai asa musux~χis maun mas a iðuk tu ɕiniða ɕia kal~ɬal~ɬaa.
S.FORM: a maza sidia hai asa musuhis maun mas a izuk tu siniza sia kalalaa.
S.PHON: a maða ɕidia x~χai asa musux~χis maun mas a iðuk tu ɕiniða ɕia kal~ɬal~ɬaa.
S.TRANSL: 山羊想回去吃採下放在籃子裡的柚子.
The goat wants to go back to eat the pomelos that had been plucked and put inside the basket.

S.FORM: haitu iskusas tainisidicia mudaan.
S.PHON: x~χaitu iskusas tainiɕidiʨia mudaan.
S.FORM: haitu iskusas tainisidicia mudaan.
S.PHON: x~χaitu iskusas tainiɕidiʨia mudaan.
S.TRANSL: 可是主人拉走牠.
But it is pulled away by his master.

S.FORM: aipincin hai minsuma tacini a mabananaza uvaaz tuntampu.
S.PHON: aipinʨin x~χai minsuma taʨini a mabananaða uvaað tuntampu.
S.FORM: aipincin hai minsuma tacini a mabananaza uvaaz tuntampu.
S.PHON: aipinʨin x~χai minsuma taʨini a mabananaða uvaað tuntampu.
S.TRANSL: 之後,一個男生騎著腳踏車過來.
Later, a boy rides a bike over here.

W.TRANSL: 今天=改變狀態=遠距.斜格

S.FORM: minnasian sia avadii tu ai sin sin ai a minnasian sia kalala tu daingias izukcia.
S.PHON: minnaɕian ɕia avadii tu ai ɕin ɕin ai a minnaɕian ɕia kal~ɬal~ɬa tu daiŋias iðukʨia.
S.FORM: minnasian sia avadii tu ai sin sin ai a minnasian sia kalala tu daingias izukcia.
S.PHON: minnaɕian ɕia avadii tu ai ɕin ɕin ai a minnaɕian ɕia kal~ɬal~ɬa tu daiŋias iðukʨia.
S.TRANSL: 他到了放了柚子的籃子那邊.
He gets to where the baskets with pomelos are.

S.FORM: maza maza uvaaza hai islunghu sakaivakaiva.
S.PHON: maða maða uvaaða x~χai isl~ɬuŋx~χu sakaivakaiva.
S.FORM: maza maza uvaaza hai islunghu sakaivakaiva.
S.PHON: maða maða uvaaða x~χai isl~ɬuŋx~χu sakaivakaiva.
S.TRANSL: 小朋友停下來,東看西望.
The child rests and looks around.

S.FORM: sadu saia tu maza tainiizuka hai idadaza sia lukiscia.
S.PHON: sadu saia tu maða tainiiðuka x~χai idadaða ɕia l~ɬukisʨia.
S.FORM: sadu saia tu maza tainiizuka hai idadaza sia lukiscia.
S.PHON: sadu saia tu maða tainiiðuka x~χai idadaða ɕia l~ɬukisʨia.
S.TRANSL: 他看到柚子的主人在樹上.
He sees the tangerine guy up in the tree.

S.FORM: ungat miliskin saia tu natanghaiu tu tasa maun.
S.PHON: uŋat mil~ɬiskin saia tu nataŋx~χaiu tu tasa maun.
S.FORM: ungat miliskin saia tu natanghaiu tu tasa maun.
S.PHON: uŋat mil~ɬiskin saia tu nataŋx~χaiu tu tasa maun.
S.TRANSL: 然後他想要偷吃一個.
Then he thinks he will steal one to eat.

S.FORM: haitu saduas saicia tainiizuka hai mikua i.
S.PHON: x~χaitu saduas saiʨia tainiiðuka x~χai mikua i.
S.FORM: haitu saduas saicia tainiizuka hai mikua i.
S.PHON: x~χaitu saduas saiʨia tainiiðuka x~χai mikua i.
S.TRANSL: 因為他看到柚子的主人看不到他.
Because he sees the tangerine farmer who doesn't see him.

S.FORM: kaz saia miliskin tu ka minsuuz tanghaiu tu tas tu kalala mas izukcia.
S.PHON: kað saia mil~ɬiskin tu ka minsuuð taŋx~χaiu tu tas tu kal~ɬal~ɬa mas iðukʨia.
S.FORM: kaz saia miliskin tu ka minsuuz tanghaiu tu tas tu kalala mas izukcia.
S.PHON: kað saia mil~ɬiskin tu ka minsuuð taŋx~χaiu tu tas tu kal~ɬal~ɬa mas iðukʨia.
S.TRANSL: 他甚至想偷一籃的柚子.
He even thinks about stealing a basket of pomelos.

S.FORM: ungat pisialun saicia tampu at ansahanun saicia tas tu kalala izuka mapundaza sia tampu.
S.PHON: uŋat piɕial~ɬun saiʨia tampu at ansax~χanun saiʨia tas tu kal~ɬal~ɬa iðuka mapundaða ɕia tampu.
S.FORM: ungat pisialun saicia tampu at ansahanun saicia tas tu kalala izuka mapundaza sia tampu.
S.PHON: uŋat piɕial~ɬun saiʨia tampu at ansax~χanun saiʨia tas tu kal~ɬal~ɬa iðuka mapundaða ɕia tampu.
S.TRANSL: 然後他弄好他的單車,把一籃子的柚子放在單車上.
Then he adjusts his bike and puts a basket of pomelos on his bike.

S.FORM: ungat paunangcia saicia tanghaiu a mudaan tundaza sia tampucia.
S.PHON: uŋat paunaŋʨia saiʨia taŋx~χaiu a mudaan tundaða ɕia tampuʨia.
S.FORM: ungat paunangcia saicia tanghaiu a mudaan tundaza sia tampucia.
S.PHON: uŋat paunaŋʨia saiʨia taŋx~χaiu a mudaan tundaða ɕia tampuʨia.
S.TRANSL: 他暫且那樣偷了,騎著單車走了.
He stole it for the time being and rides his bike away.

S.FORM: haitu masa tuntanpu saia mamas izukcia mapalanduu mas binanauaz tu tuntanpu amin.
S.PHON: x~χaitu masa tuntanpu saia mamas iðukʨia mapal~ɬanduu mas binanauað tu tuntanpu amin.
S.FORM: haitu masa tuntanpu saia mamas izukcia mapalanduu mas binanauaz tu tuntanpu amin.
S.PHON: x~χaitu masa tuntanpu saia mamas iðukʨia mapal~ɬanduu mas binanauað tu tuntanpu amin.
S.TRANSL: 當他騎單車背著柚子的時候,他遇到一個也騎著單車的小姐.
When he rides on the bike with the pomelos on his back, he meets a girl who also rides a bike.

S.FORM: mapunahtung a naia hai cibiskavan a isaicia tamuung at.
S.PHON: mapunax~χtuŋ a naia x~χai ʨibiskavan a isaiʨia tamuuŋ at.
S.FORM: mapunahtung a naia hai cibiskavan a isaicia tamuung at.
S.PHON: mapunax~χtuŋ a naia x~χai ʨibiskavan a isaiʨia tamuuŋ at.
S.TRANSL: 他們互相擦撞,他的帽子飛了.
They bumped into each other roughly, and his hat was dropped off.

S.FORM: sakakiiv a saia sadu hai nii saia haiap tu aiza maza batu itanangaus.
S.PHON: sakakiiv a saia sadu x~χai nii saia x~χaiap tu aiða maða batu itanaŋaus.
S.FORM: sakakiiv a saia sadu hai nii saia haiap tu aiza maza batu itanangaus.
S.PHON: sakakiiv a saia sadu x~χai nii saia x~χaiap tu aiða maða batu itanaŋaus.
S.TRANSL: 他回頭看一眼,不知道前面有個石頭.
He looked back, knowing nothing about the stone ahead.

S.FORM: paptuhas tauntaun tu tanpucia at at saia tudii hai pantunghaz mututu amin a maza izuk.
S.PHON: paptux~χas tauntaun tu tanpuʨia at at saia tudii x~χai pantuŋx~χað mututu amin a maða iðuk.
S.FORM: paptuhas tauntaun tu tanpucia at at saia tudii hai pantunghaz mututu amin a maza izuk.
S.PHON: paptux~χas tauntaun tu tanpuʨia at at saia tudii x~χai pantuŋx~χað mututu amin a maða iðuk.

TRANSL.notes: 車輪撞上了(石頭),然後那個時候他倒了,柚子也散出來了.

S.TRANSL: 車輪撞上了 ,然後那個時候他倒了,柚子也散出來了.
The bicycle hit the stone on the wheel. Then he fell off his bike, and the pomelos were spilt out.

S.FORM: at panlanglang isaicia maza sia bantasa.
S.PHON: at panl~ɬaŋl~ɬaŋ isaiʨia maða ɕia bantasa.
S.FORM: at panlanglang isaicia maza sia bantasa.
S.PHON: at panl~ɬaŋl~ɬaŋ isaiʨia maða ɕia bantasa.
S.TRANSL: 他的腳也撞破皮了在石頭上.
He scratched his foot.

S.FORM: at uninang aiza tatau maza uvaaz isian sia silasdaancia tudii sadu tu mucingkul saia hai adiia tatau uvaaz hai mindangaz.
S.PHON: at uninaŋ aiða tatau maða uvaað iɕian ɕia ɕil~ɬasdaanʨia tudii sadu tu muʨiŋkul~ɬ saia x~χai adiia tatau uvaað x~χai mindaŋað.
S.FORM: at uninang aiza tatau maza uvaaz isian sia silasdaancia tudii sadu tu mucingkul saia hai adiia tatau uvaaz hai mindangaz.
S.PHON: at uninaŋ aiða tatau maða uvaað iɕian ɕia ɕil~ɬasdaanʨia tudii sadu tu muʨiŋkul~ɬ saia x~χai adiia tatau uvaað x~χai mindaŋað.
S.TRANSL: 幸好有三個孩子那時候在路邊看到他跌倒而去幫忙.
Fortunately, three kids in the street saw him tripping over himself then. They went helping him.

W.TRANSL: 可見.遠距-那裡=遠距.主格

S.FORM: at mindia mas izukcia kaidusaan naicia kalala mapundaza sia tanpucia.
S.PHON: at mindia mas iðukʨia kaidusaan naiʨia kal~ɬal~ɬa mapundaða ɕia tanpuʨia.
S.FORM: at mindia mas izukcia kaidusaan naicia kalala mapundaza sia tanpucia.
S.PHON: at mindia mas iðukʨia kaidusaan naiʨia kal~ɬal~ɬa mapundaða ɕia tanpuʨia.
S.TRANSL: 兩個人撿起柚子,一起把籃子搬上單車
Picking up pomelos, two moved the basket onto the bike.

S.FORM: at umanus uvaazcia batu makunasia silasdaan.
S.PHON: at umanus uvaaðʨia batu makunaɕia ɕil~ɬasdaan.
S.FORM: at umanus uvaazcia batu makunasia silasdaan.
S.PHON: at umanus uvaaðʨia batu makunaɕia ɕil~ɬasdaan.
S.TRANSL: 孩子把石頭移到路邊.
The kid put the stone away the street.

S.FORM: ungat adiia uvaaza taininghaius izuka hai 'alakan saicia tampua at pis'aika'aika upa at panmang a nadadu madahpa bantas aupa panmangmang masa mucingkul.
S.PHON: uŋat adiia uvaaða tainiŋx~χaius iðuka x~χai ʔal~ɬakan saiʨia tampua at pisʔaikaʔaika upa at panmaŋ a nadadu madax~χpa bantas aupa panmaŋmaŋ masa muʨiŋkul~ɬ.
S.FORM: ungat adiia uvaaza taininghaius izuka hai 'alakan saicia tampua at pis'aika'aika upa at panmang a nadadu madahpa bantas aupa panmangmang masa mucingkul.
S.PHON: uŋat adiia uvaaða tainiŋx~χaius iðuka x~χai ʔal~ɬakan saiʨia tampua at pisʔaikaʔaika upa at panmaŋ a nadadu madax~χpa bantas aupa panmaŋmaŋ masa muʨiŋkul~ɬ.
S.TRANSL: 腳可能很痛因為跌倒時撞得很嚴重.
He might hurt his foot because he fell roughly.

W.TRANSL: 可見.遠距-那裡=遠距.主格

S.FORM: haitu maza tacini taintataua uvaaz hai sadu tu isaicia maza tamuung hai isia silasdaan pis'ulukas saicia izaun saicia tamuunga.
S.PHON: x~χaitu maða taʨini taintataua uvaað x~χai sadu tu isaiʨia maða tamuuŋ x~χai iɕia ɕil~ɬasdaan pisʔul~ɬukas saiʨia iðaun saiʨia tamuuŋa.
S.FORM: haitu maza tacini taintataua uvaaz hai sadu tu isaicia maza tamuung hai isia silasdaan pis'ulukas saicia izaun saicia tamuunga.
S.PHON: x~χaitu maða taʨini taintataua uvaað x~χai sadu tu isaiʨia maða tamuuŋ x~χai iɕia ɕil~ɬasdaan pisʔul~ɬukas saiʨia iðaun saiʨia tamuuŋa.
S.TRANSL: 但是那三個孩子中的一個看到他的帽子在路邊, 吹口哨叫他,把帽子拿給她.
Yet one of the three kids saw his hat and called him by whistling, and then took the hat back to him.

S.FORM: a kantulun mapunsian sia adiia tainiunis tamuungcia tu tanghaiu mas izuk tu uvaaza.
S.PHON: a kantul~ɬun mapunɕian ɕia adiia tainiunis tamuuŋʨia tu taŋx~χaiu mas iðuk tu uvaaða.
S.FORM: a kantulun mapunsian sia adiia tainiunis tamuungcia tu tanghaiu mas izuk tu uvaaza.
S.PHON: a kantul~ɬun mapunɕian ɕia adiia tainiunis tamuuŋʨia tu taŋx~χaiu mas iðuk tu uvaaða.
S.TRANSL: 他就跟過去把帽子還給他的主人,那個偷柚子的孩子.
He walked along and return the hat to its owner, the kid who had stolen the pomelos.

W.TRANSL: 主焦-使役-前進-處格.中距
可見.遠距-那裡=遠距.主格

S.FORM: ungat saivan saia tu tau mas izukcia nasatatasaun naicia maun aupa tantatau naia.
S.PHON: uŋat saivan saia tu tau mas iðukʨia nasatatasaun naiʨia maun aupa tantatau naia.
S.FORM: ungat saivan saia tu tau mas izukcia nasatatasaun naicia maun aupa tantatau naia.
S.PHON: uŋat saivan saia tu tau mas iðukʨia nasatatasaun naiʨia maun aupa tantatau naia.
S.TRANSL: 他得到三個柚子,他們要一人吃一個因為他們有三個人同行.
He got three pomelos. Each of them got one to eat because they were three walking in a row.

S.FORM: at pahusilun saicia izuka satatasa at.
S.PHON: at pax~χuɕil~ɬun saiʨia iðuka satatasa at.
S.FORM: at pahusilun saicia izuka satatasa at.
S.PHON: at pax~χuɕil~ɬun saiʨia iðuka satatasa at.
S.TRANSL: 然後他們一人分了一個.
Then they shared one for each.

S.FORM: aupa tundadaancia naia mai'aupasia kaizuk tu at mabananazcia.
S.PHON: aupa tundadaanʨia naia maiʔaupaɕia kaiðuk tu at mabananaðʨia.
S.FORM: aupa tundadaancia naia mai'aupasia kaizuk tu at mabananazcia.
S.PHON: aupa tundadaanʨia naia maiʔaupaɕia kaiðuk tu at mabananaðʨia.
S.TRANSL: 因為他們沿路朝著收柚子的男人那邊走.
because they walk along the road heading to the harvester.

S.FORM: ikdadaanun naicia maza izuka mamaun.
S.PHON: ikdadaanun naiʨia maða iðuka mamaun.
S.FORM: ikdadaanun naicia maza izuka mamaun.
S.PHON: ikdadaanun naiʨia maða iðuka mamaun.
S.TRANSL: 那個柚子他們邊走邊吃.
They were walking and eating the pomelos.

S.FORM: at maza tainiizuka kaizuk a mabananaza kunastu saia.
S.PHON: at maða tainiiðuka kaiðuk a mabananaða kunastu saia.
S.FORM: at maza tainiizuka kaizuk a mabananaza kunastu saia.
S.PHON: at maða tainiiðuka kaiðuk a mabananaða kunastu saia.
S.TRANSL: 然後那個採收柚子的人下來.
Then the tangerine harvester went down.

S.FORM: na si'apav mas izuk mapungadah kalala hai.
S.PHON: na ɕiʔapav mas iðuk mapuŋadax~χ kal~ɬal~ɬa x~χai.
S.FORM: na si'apav mas izuk mapungadah kalala hai.
S.PHON: na ɕiʔapav mas iðuk mapuŋadax~χ kal~ɬal~ɬa x~χai.
S.TRANSL: 他拿起來要放在籃子的時候,
When he was taking the basket to fill it,

S.FORM: cinhuza saia tu ai mavia dusa tu kalala izuk tu kaaz kaazin kaz.
S.PHON: ʨinx~χuða saia tu ai mavia dusa tu kal~ɬal~ɬa iðuk tu kaað kaaðin kað.
S.FORM: cinhuza saia tu ai mavia dusa tu kalala izuk tu kaaz kaazin kaz.
S.PHON: ʨinx~χuða saia tu ai mavia dusa tu kal~ɬal~ɬa iðuk tu kaað kaaðin kað.
S.TRANSL: 他嚇了一跳:為什麼一籃柚子就...
He startled: why did a basket of pomelos...

S.FORM: tautasa tu upa tau tu tau a kalalaan matmuzin a dusa.
S.PHON: tautasa tu upa tau tu tau a kal~ɬal~ɬaan matmuðin a dusa.
S.FORM: tautasa tu upa tau tu tau a kalalaan matmuzin a dusa.
S.PHON: tautasa tu upa tau tu tau a kal~ɬal~ɬaan matmuðin a dusa.
S.TRANSL: 因為三個籃子中的兩個要滿了.
Because two of these three basket ware to get full.

S.FORM: ai kazin a namatmuz tasa ukin tasa.
S.PHON: ai kaðin a namatmuð tasa ukin tasa.
S.FORM: ai kazin a namatmuz tasa ukin tasa.
S.PHON: ai kaðin a namatmuð tasa ukin tasa.
S.TRANSL: 欸?那個要滿的籃子一個不見了.
What? One of the basket getting full disappeared.

S.FORM: hai ciuduL2JL tudiip anghaiv a tatau uvaaza mamaun mas maszang 'iniza saicia tu izuk mapusia kalalaa.
S.PHON: x~χai ʨiudul~ɬ**l~ɬ tudiip aŋx~χaiv a tatau uvaaða mamaun mas masðaŋ ʔiniða saiʨia tu iðuk mapuɕia kal~ɬal~ɬaa.
S.FORM: hai ciuduL2JL tudiip anghaiv a tatau uvaaza mamaun mas maszang 'iniza saicia tu izuk mapusia kalalaa.
S.PHON: x~χai ʨiudul~ɬ**l~ɬ tudiip aŋx~χaiv a tatau uvaaða mamaun mas masðaŋ ʔiniða saiʨia tu iðuk mapuɕia kal~ɬal~ɬaa.
S.TRANSL: 剛好那時候三個孩子經過,邊吃他所採的柚子一樣放在籃子吃著好像從籃子裡拿的柚子.
Meanwhile the three kids were passing by, eating pomelos that were likely taken from the basket.

S.FORM: kana'anakin miliskin tu makua sain tu ah painlanduan tu sinkuzakuza.
S.PHON: kanaʔanakin mil~ɬiskin tu makua sain tu ax~χ painl~ɬanduan tu ɕinkuðakuða.
S.FORM: kana'anakin miliskin tu makua sain tu ah painlanduan tu sinkuzakuza.
S.PHON: kanaʔanakin mil~ɬiskin tu makua sain tu ax~χ painl~ɬanduan tu ɕinkuðakuða.
S.TRANSL: 你們自己去想了,這個工作的事是怎麼一回事?
He wondered by himself how had this thing about work happened.
